rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
For stateful equations, use initialized temporal recurrence: 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Use const for named constants and eq for helper equations
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in type scope contracts
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use comparison expressions for bool, integer arithmetic for int, and real arithmetic for real
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const for named constants and eq for helper equations
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in type scope contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
